title: Tournament Name
body: Pick a name participants will recognize. Sandbox tournaments are temporary test spaces and are marked as TEST automatically.

title: URL Slug
body: Creates the direct link to your tournament. It is generated from the name and checked for uniqueness when you continue.

title: Tournament Gender
body: Choose Regular for male teams or HFI for female teams. Real tournament teams are checked against their Hattrick league.

title: Tournament Type
body: Hattrick Validated lets managers join with CHPP. Organizer-Managed lets you add teams yourself. Just Testing creates a clearly marked sandbox with dummy Hattrick teams for trying the flow.

title: Scoring Mode
body: 120-minute mode counts matches reaching 120 minutes as achievements. Regular mode uses standard 3/1/0 points.

title: Private Tournament
body: Private tournaments stay out of public lists, but people with the direct link can still view and join while registration is open.

title: League Restriction
body: Optional. Limit real tournament registration to a specific country or Hattrick league. This option is not used for sandbox team selection.

title: Description
body: Optional text shown on the tournament page. Keep it useful for participants: explain the community, rules or friendly format.

title: Teams and Schedule
body: Add at least two teams before generating a schedule. After generation, participants arrange the listed friendlies in Hattrick and the site refreshes results from CHPP.

title: Sandbox Tournaments
body: Sandbox tournaments use real Hattrick team metadata but do not represent real manager participation. Add random teams, test restrictions and try schedule generation or regeneration without affecting real tournament eligibility.
